step_rationale: Circulating RNA biomarker diagnostic for NSTEMI; detects myocardial injury.
mechanism: A circulating RNA species that is differentially expressed in NSTEMI and serves as an early diagnostic marker of myocardial injury.

references.title: Circulating long noncoding RNA PDE4DIPP6: A novel biomarker for improving the clinical management of non-ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
